mapper.insert: insert into batch.outbox_event ( tenant_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, event_key, payload_json, publish_status, publish_attempt, next_publish_at, trace_id, priority ) select #{tenantId}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, #{eventKey}, #{payloadJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{publishStatus}, #{publishAttempt}, #{nextPublishAt}, #{traceId}, coalesce(#{priority}, 5) where not exists ( select 1 from batch.outbox_event where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and event_key = #{eventKey} )
mapper.select:
select distinct tenant_id from batch.outbox_event where publish_status in (#{pendingStatus1}, #{pendingStatus2}) and (next_publish_at is null or next_publish_at <= current_timestamp)
and (hashtext(tenant_id) & 2147483647) % #{shardTotal} = #{shardIndex}
mapper.update: update batch.outbox_event set publish_status = #{publishingStatus}, publish_attempt = publish_attempt + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and publish_status in (#{pendingStatus1}, #{pendingStatus2})

update batch.outbox_event set publish_status = #{failedStatus}, next_publish_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where publish_status = #{publishingStatus} and updated_at < current_timestamp - (#{timeoutSeconds} || ' seconds')::interval
mapper.select: select count(*) from ( select 1 from batch.outbox_event where created_at > current_timestamp - (#{sinceSeconds} || ' seconds')::interval group by tenant_id, event_key having count(*) > 1 ) dups
mapper.insert: insert into archive.outbox_event_archive select * from batch.outbox_event where id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.event_delivery_log_archive select * from batch.event_delivery_log where outbox_event_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
insert into archive.event_outbox_retry_archive select * from batch.event_outbox_retry where outbox_event_id in #{id} on conflict (id) do nothing
